headline: Bungie gives up on Destiny
summary: Bungie will release Destiny 2's final major update on June 9th. The studio is shifting focus towards a "new beginning" for Bungie. Destiny 2 will remain playable after the update, similar to the first Destiny.

headline: Sonos’s pint-sized Roam 2 speaker is 25 percent off for Memorial Day
summary: The Sonos Roam 2 portable Bluetooth speaker is currently 25% off for Memorial Day. Priced at $134 ($45 off), it's ideal for outdoor activities. Find the deal at Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart.

headline: The Endless AI guitar pedal has potential
summary: Polyend, a respected music gear maker, has introduced an AI guitar pedal named "Endless." It's one of the first AI-powered effects pedals on the market. The device continues Polyend's tradition of niche, idiosyncratic music tech.

headline: Uber is deploying its own self-driving cars again, just not as robotaxis
summary: Uber is reactivating its autonomous vehicle program under a new "AV Lab" project. These cars will collect data for Uber's robotaxi partners. Importantly, these vehicles will not operate as public robotaxis.

headline: Samsung's Highest End 55" 4K OLED TV (S95F) Drops to $899 During the Best Buy Memorial Day Sale
summary: Samsung's high-end 55" 4K OLED TV (S95F) is on sale for Memorial Day. The price has dropped to $899 at Best Buy. This offers significant savings from its previous $1,600 price point.

headline: This Iniu 20,000 Power Bank Quadruples Your Nintendo Switch 2 Play Time For $17
summary: An Iniu 20,000 mAh power bank is available for just $17. It can quadruple the Nintendo Switch 2's play time. The power bank also allows simultaneous play and charging.

headline: Bungie Walks Away From Destiny 2, Final Content Update Coming in June
summary: Bungie has announced the cessation of content updates for Destiny 2. The live-service shooter's final update arrives in June. This decision comes nearly nine years after the game's initial launch.

headline: Brandon Sanderson's Skyward Adaptation Would Be Perfect as a Netflix Series
summary: A Netflix series adaptation is suggested for Brandon Sanderson's "Skyward" books. This proposal comes despite Apple TV's existing work on other Cosmere adaptations. The article posits Netflix would be an ideal platform for the series.

headline: Cheaper theme park tickets and children's meals as VAT to be cut for some attractions this summer
summary: Chancellor Rachel Reeves announced VAT cuts for select attractions this summer. The move aims to alleviate cost-of-living pressures for families. Consumers can expect cheaper theme park tickets and children's meals.

headline: Late Queen was 'very keen' for Andrew to be given trade envoy role
summary: Newly released documents reveal Queen Elizabeth's strong desire for Prince Andrew. She was "very keen" for him to take on a "prominent role." Specifically, the Queen wished him to be given a trade envoy position.

headline: Toilets and changing rooms must be used on basis of biological sex, guidance confirms
summary: New guidance confirms that toilet and changing room usage must align with biological sex. The guidelines were published following a landmark Supreme Court ruling last year. This clarifies public facility policies.

headline: UK migration drops to 171,000 - almost half 2024's figure
summary: UK migration has significantly dropped to 171,000. This figure is almost half of 2024's previous total. The Prime Minister asserts his government is delivering on its promise to control borders.
